items.claim: Dioni Barbosa has a physically imposing grappling game that will allow her to control position against Anna Melissano.
items.quote: I think Dioni Barbosa with the physically imposing grappling game gets to top position makes Mil Misano uncomfortable

items.claim: Anna Melissano is naturally a 115-pound fighter and will be at a physical disadvantage moving up to 125 pounds.
items.quote: she's certainly a 115 pound fighter. I think at 125, I have a little fear of physicality from the only Barbosa side

items.claim: Anna Melissano possesses superior kickboxing skills compared to Dioni Barbosa.
items.quote: If she does survive Barbosa early and start finding the takedown defense and rhythm on the feet, she's definitely better at kickboxing.

items.claim: Alvin Hines' durability in his previous fight against Johannes was aided by the use of performance-enhancing drugs.
items.quote: He was on Masteron and you know juice to the gills in that fight and I think that probably aided to the durability.

items.claim: RJ Harris has a significant size advantage with a four-inch height and six-inch reach advantage over Alvin Hines.
items.quote: He's got that nice size advantage, four in taller, six inches in reach.

items.claim: Alvin Hines is susceptible to being caught by left hooks.
items.quote: I feel like Hines gets caught by left hooks and I think RJ Harris could end up landing that killshot left hook

items.claim: Stuart Nickel has a bad habit of relying on spinning attacks that leave him vulnerable.
items.quote: He likes the spinning attacks a lot, which I just think is a mistake. It's a bad habit more than anything else.

items.claim: Alden Cora possesses superior technical striking and combination punching compared to Stuart Nickel.
items.quote: his kickboxing is good. A lot better at striking than Steuart Nickel. Combination punching is nice.
